# claude_workspace_members (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all members of a Claude workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_workspace_members" "example" {
  workspace_id = "wrkspc_01EXAMPLE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String) The ID of the workspace.

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) The list of workspace members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user.
- `workspace_id` (String) The ID of the workspace.
- `workspace_role` (String) The role of the member in the workspace.
